achievements.title: More like Northpolis
achievements.description: Complete the Hero Ending of Westopolis while only holding forward and without using the C-Stick

achievements.title: Causing a Short Circuit
achievements.description: Complete the Dark Ending of Digital Circuit with exactly 50 Rings in hand and without losing your Rings more than twice
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Preferring the Dark Side
achievements.description: Complete the Neutral Ending of Glyphic Canyon with less than 500 Hero points and without dying
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Going For a Roadkill
achievements.description: Complete the Dark Ending of Lethal Highway without using the A Button more than 3 times
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Cryptic Use of Weapons
achievements.description: Complete the Dark Ending of Cryptic Castle with no more than 4 weapon pickups
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: My Assistance You Approve
achievements.description: Complete the Hero Ending of Prison Island without defeating any G.U.N. associates
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Clown Show
achievements.description: Complete the Dark Ending of Circus Park without ever having more than 10 rings in hand
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Survival of the Fittest
achievements.description: Complete the Dark Ending of Central City without having more than 30 ammunition or picking up more than 2 weapons
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Memorizing It All
achievements.description: Complete the Neutral Ending of The Doom without activating any checkpoints
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: No More Sins
achievements.description: Complete the Neutral Ending of Sky Troops with less than 5k combined points and without dying
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Weak Weapons
achievements.description: Complete the Hero Ending of Mad Matrix without using your weapons more than 4 times
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Death To All
achievements.description: Complete the Dark Ending of Death Ruins with 120 ammunition or more
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: A Riding Knight
achievements.description: Complete the Neutral Ending of The ARK while only staying on the Dragon and without bonking more than 3 times
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Fleeing Through the Air
achievements.description: Complete the Hero Ending of Air Fleet with only a single weapon and never getting rid of it
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Skating in the Jungle
achievements.description: Complete the Hero Ending of Iron Jungle in under 1:30 and without dying
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Space Poison
achievements.description: Complete the Neutral Ending of Space Gadget with less than 2k combined points and without dying
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: An Impact on Our Economy
achievements.description: Complete the Neutral Ending of Lost Impact without collecting any rings
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: No Afford in Fort
achievements.description: Complete the Dark Ending of GUN Fortress with less than 1k Normal points and without dying
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: The Blackout
achievements.description: Complete the Dark Ending of Black Comet without having more than 50 ammunition or picking up more than 1 weapon
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Burning Soles
achievements.description: Complete the Hero Ending of Lava Shelter in under 2:30 and without dying
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Not Falling for Your Tricks
achievements.description: Complete the Hero Ending of Cosmic Fall without using the A Button more than 5 times
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Haunted by Greed
achievements.description: Complete the Hero Ending of Final Haunt with 150 ammunition or more
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Too Easy, Piece of Cake
achievements.description: Defeat Black Bull in Lethal Highway without slowing down the time or picking up a weapon
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Creepy Cracks
achievements.description: Defeat Egg Breaker in Cryptic Castle without destroying more than 4 trees
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Speedy Competition
achievements.description: Defeat Heavy Dog in The Doom without falling down more than 3 times
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Eggcellent
achievements.description: Defeat Egg Breaker in Mad Matrix without being hurt more than twice
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Mr Bull's Wild Ride
achievements.description: Defeat Black Bull in Death Ruins while only staying on the rail and only attack him once you've been on the rails
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Taking A Heavy Blow
achievements.description: Defeat Blue Falcon in The ARK without falling down more than twice
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Just In Time
achievements.description: Defeat Egg Breaker in Iron Jungle while only attacking him when the time is slowed down
achievements.author: Darky
